title: Crab Champions
description:
Crab Champions is a fast paced roguelike shooter. Travel solo or with friends across exotic islands defeating hordes of enemies, collecting loot and becoming as powerful as possible creating game breaking builds!

 

KEY FEATURES• Run based: the fun of a looter shooter packed into intense 20-40 minute runs with the option to loop endlessly to survive as long as you can!

• Smooth and responsive movement and combat

• Carefully crafted visuals with a focus on quality while maintaining high performance

• An original soundtrack made specifically for the game

• Complete challenges to unlock cosmetic skins and put your skills to the test in Nightmare difficulty with modifiers to spice things up even further

• Play solo or assemble a multiplayer squad: the game is balanced separately for different party sizes

• Every choice matters: each run presents you with different loot combinations, enemy types and tough decisions

• Solo developed by the creator of Crab Rave 🦀

• No lootboxes, microtransactions or ANY additional purchases required- all content is available to unlock in game by playing
 

CHAOTIC FUN

PARKOUR ISLANDS

DEEP BUILD CRAFTING

TONS OF LOOT
WARNING: This game allows you to create over the top and visually intense builds that may create flashing lights that could be potentially unsuitable for those that have an epileptic condition.
description_short: Claw your way across exotic islands combining fluid movement with fast paced combat to become a Crab Champion in this third person roguelike shooter.
